equipment.title: Equipment Purchase
equipment.description: Equipment purchases over $1,000 require additional approval
requirements: Complete A1 form required for equipment over $1,000
equipment.notes: Contact division.admin.comtl@ssss.gouv.qc.ca for questions about equipment reimbursement

conference_registration.title: Conference Registration
requirements: Names and titles of all registered individuals must be indicated

car_rental.title: Car Rental
requirements: Insurance must be purchased
car_rental.notes: Charges for damages when insurance has not been purchased will not be reimbursed

gas.title: Gas/Fuel
requirements: Car rental must be documented
gas.notes: Gas for personal vehicles is not eligible; use mileage rate instead

mileage.title: Personal Vehicle Mileage
mileage.description: Use of personal vehicle for travel
requirements: Google map of route taken required

taxi.title: Taxi/Transportation
requirements: Detailed receipt required

parking.title: Parking
requirements: Detailed receipt required

airfare.title: Airfare/Bus/Train
requirements: Lowest fare required for tri-council grants
Boarding passes required
Details for any change/baggage fees required
airfare.notes: Cost of fare, seat selection, and change fees are eligible

accommodations.title: Accommodations
requirements: Standard rooms in publicly available, registered business
accommodations.notes: For private stays with family/friends/colleagues: $30.00/night (provide written details of location and nights)

meals.title: Meals
requirements: Itemized receipts required (standalone credit/debit slips not accepted)
Per diem rates may be claimed in lieu of itemized receipts
Per diem should be adjusted if meals are provided at the event
documentation: Itemized receipt with breakdown of charges, fees, and taxes
meals.notes: Alcohol is not eligible for reimbursement from grant funds. May only be reimbursed on an exception basis with Director approval.

alcohol.title: Alcohol
requirements: Director approval required
Exception basis only
alcohol.notes: Not eligible from grant funds. May be reimbursed based on eligible funding source in keeping with McGill hospitality policy

exchange_rate.title: Foreign Currency Exchange
requirements: Documentation indicating amount paid in CAD required
Or use Bank of Canada rates on day of purchase
documentation: Bank/credit card statement showing CAD amount
OR Bank of Canada exchange rate proof
exchange_rate.notes: For exact amounts, documentation showing CAD equivalent required. Otherwise, Bank of Canada rates on purchase date will be used.

advance_request.title: Advance Request Estimations
advance_request.description: Guidelines for estimating travel advance amounts
requirements: Use per-diem rates and standard transportation/accommodation rules to estimate costs
documentation: Supporting documentation is not required at the advance stage, but will be required upon return
advance_request.notes: Any unspent advance funds must be returned. If actual expenses exceed the advance, a supplement can be requested.

receipts.title: Receipt Requirements
receipts.description: All receipts must meet strict digital submission requirements
requirements: Ensure the full document is clearly legible with no cut-off edges
Must be issued in the name of the claimant
Include an itemized breakdown of all charges, fees, and taxes
Clearly indicate payment method, date of service, and complete vendor information
receipts.notes: Credit card/debit slips alone are not accepted as valid receipts. Retain original physical copies for 7 years.

eligibility.title: Eligible Expenses
eligibility.description: Only eligible expenses will be reimbursed
requirements: Expenses must be for researchers or eligible staff/students only
Not for personal reasons or family/personal contacts
Direct cost of research for which funds were awarded
Benefits directly attributable to the grant
Effective and economical
Not result in personal gain for research team members
documentation: Proof of eligibility for all claimants
eligibility.notes: Reimbursements may be adjusted based on granting agency and organizational policies

validation.RECEIPT_MISSING_ITEMIZATION: Receipt must include itemized breakdown of all charges, fees, and taxes
